rationale: The only direct evidence is a single DOI-level reference match (ref 43) with no in-text citation context, so we cannot tell how deeply the 2014 paper is used. The cited paper is about transaction-based habit measures and customer profit, while the citing paper focuses on structural CLV estimation with budget constraints in CPG; this thematic overlap in customer profitability is plausible but not enough to confirm substantive dependence from the provided notes alone.
